description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/gbraad/byo-atomic-toolbox:f25 for a job named pages. The pages job runs in the default deploy stage, executes the shell commands './compose.sh', 'mv /srv/repo public', and 'cp index.html ./public', then publishes the 'public' directory as a Pages artifact. It should only run on the master branch. No services, caches, or extra variables are required.
